 367:     """Expect conditional maximization for scale parameters.
 368: 
 369:     Arguments:
 370:       - xs (`np.array`): array of flattened tmrcas.
 371:       - zs0 (`np.array`): array of inclusion probabilities in first component.
 372:       - zs1 (`np.array`): array of inclusion probabilities in second component.
 373:       - a0 (`float`): shape parameter of first component.

 381:   """Compute the two ECM updates in lockstep.
 382: 
 383:   Arguments:
 384:     - xs_flat (`float`): all tmrca values used for mix gamma estimation
 385:     - alpha (`float`): the proportion in the first tmrca cutoff
 386:     - a1 (`float`): the shape parameter for t_admix
